subcodes.first_line: Verily, We send forth the fragrant breaths of the All-Merciful from the Egypt of inner meanings and utterance unto a people that turned to God when He appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نرسل نفحه الرحمن من مصر المعانی و البیان الی امه اقبلت الی الله اذ اتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
